componentDescription: Enables users to select an icon from a predefined list, offering various styling and interaction options.

id.description: Unique identifier for the IconPicker component.

name.description: The name attribute for the input element, used for form submission.

label.description: The label displayed for the IconPicker.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text displayed when no icon is selected.

helperText.description: Supplementary text displayed below the IconPicker for guidance.

value.description: The currently selected icon's name (controlled component prop).

defaultValue.description: The initial selected icon's name (uncontrolled component prop).

onChange.description: Callback function triggered when an icon is selected or the value changes.

views.description: Custom styles to apply to different parts of the IconPicker component.

size.description: Defines the overall size of the IconPicker component.

shape.description: Defines the shape of the IconPicker's visual elements.

variant.description: Defines the visual variant (e.g., filled, outlined) of the IconPicker.

error.description: Indicates if the IconPicker is in an error state, triggering error styling.

isDisabled.description: If true, the IconPicker will be disabled and non-interactive.

isReadOnly.description: If true, the IconPicker will be read-only, preventing user input but allowing selection.

showSearch.description: Determines whether the search input field is displayed within the dropdown.

isOpen.description: Controls the open/closed state of the icon picker dropdown (controlled component prop).

onOpen.description: Callback function triggered when the icon picker dropdown is opened.

onClose.description: Callback function triggered when the icon picker dropdown is closed.

closeOnSelect.description: If true, the dropdown will close automatically after an icon is selected.
